stage: Sprint 4 Lever 1b — d3 recipe on conservatively-MLM-adapted Snowflake
hypothesis: Lever 1a damaged the retrieval geometry too aggressively (LR=1e-5, 2 epochs, no encoder freeze) — q001 gold moved as predicted (rank 137→42) but the broad geometric damage was −0.020 hybrid. Lever 1b dials back: LR=5e-6, 1 epoch, encoder frozen for first 500 steps so the lm_head converges first. Predicted outcome: q001 still moves, q018 and other strong queries are preserved, hybrid hits 0.39-0.42.
